items.title: Conversational link and memory-only Socratic seed
evidence: CI run 29333673842: failure at Harness verify
static node --check reproduction: JSON.stringify { is a SyntaxError
consent reproduction: Sure, what will this cost? => yes
consent reproduction: Okay, explain what will be sent first. => yes
EOF reproduction: readline question exits non-cleanly without a catch
acceptance: select one existing inference path conversationally without guessing ambiguity
require separate billing-disclosed consent before a minimal verification call
after a verified path, collect preferred name and first objective
print a bounded memory-only mirror without filesystem or installation mutation
package-local and packed-artifact checks pass without live credentials

failures: packages/workframe/bin/workframe.js contains body: JSON.stringify { in testOpenRouter, so npm run check and npm test cannot pass on the current head

interpretConsent treats bare sure and okay tokens anywhere in a sentence as authorization, so questions such as Sure, what will this cost? and Okay, explain what will be sent first. authorize a provider call
help claims credential values are never transmitted by Workframe, while direct OpenAI and OpenRouter verification necessarily sends the selected environment credential to that provider after consent

the checks exercise helper functions and smoke entrypoints but do not prove the authority boundary: denial and ambiguous consent must prevent invocation, failed verification must prevent Socratic questions, and identity/objective prompts must require a verified link
EOF and interrupted input are not handled by runInteractive; the prior graceful input-ended path was removed, leaving non-clean termination before explicit consent
required_remediation: restore valid JSON.stringify({...}) syntax and rerun package-local plus packed-artifact checks from the exact reviewed head
make affirmative consent explicit and fail closed for questions, qualifiers, requests for explanation, and other ambiguous language
replace the absolute credential-transmission claim with truthful wording: credentials are never printed or persisted and are sent only to the explicitly approved selected provider
add injectable verification/dialogue seams and end-to-end tests proving no invocation before consent, no dialogue after failed verification, and graceful refusal, EOF, Ctrl+C, and timeout outcomes
reconcile WF-CLI-001 back to todo in docs/ledger/backlog.json without modifying existing non-CLI history

items.title: Truthful runtime and provider capability graph
Explicit apply and rollback authority gates

invariants: Do not modify packages/create-workframe, apps, services, infra, or existing runtime behavior.
Do not read, print, persist, or transmit credential values except directly to the explicitly selected provider after consent.
Do not overwrite, adopt, or mutate an existing setup without explicit approval of a concrete immutable plan.
Do not use a Workframe-hosted or implicit cloud fallback.
Publication remains a separate reviewed release decision.
